title: I want Mace
description: This resource pack is made for Minecraft 1.20 and older versions. When you rename an axe to “Mace” in 1.21, it will display the custom Mace texture. Requires the CIT Resewn mod to work properly.
body:
This resource pack is made for Minecraft 1.20 and older versions. When you rename an axe to “Mace” in 1.21, it will display the custom Mace texture. Requires the CIT Resewn mod to work properly.
 for older versions!
